claim: WHO/UNICEF WUENIC estimates 20 million zero-dose and under-vaccinated children in 2023, declining from 28 million in 2019 but concentrated in ten countries and in poorest wealth quintile.

source.title: WHO/UNICEF Estimates of National Immunization Coverage (WUENIC)

method: Reviewed WUENIC coverage estimates, zero-dose trends, and country profiles.
limitations: Coverage estimates are modeled from survey and administrative data.
Sub-national estimates are not systematically reported.
